articles.title: OpenAI Staffers Are Funding a Rival Super PAC to Take on Their Boss
articles.raw_content: OpenAI employees have donated more than $215,000 to a political effort opposing Leading the Future, a group backed by the company’s president, Greg Brockman.
articles.summary: Los empleados de OpenAI han donado más de 215.000 dólares a una campaña en contra de Leading the Future, grupo respaldado por su presidente, Greg Brockman.

articles.title: VodafoneThree puts P.I. Works’ SMO at the center of network transformation
articles.raw_content: Autonomy is automation that has gained trust; the trust of the network, the trust of the subscribers and the trust of the mobile operators. As VodafoneThree integrates two major mobile…
articles.summary: VodafoneThree integra dos grandes operadores móviles, impulsando la autonomía y automatización en la red.

articles.title: OpenAI researcher Miles Wang in talks to launch AI drug discovery startup valued at $2B
articles.raw_content: The funding discussions point to investor interest in applying AI to make breakthroughs in life sciences.
articles.summary: Inversores muestran interés en aplicar la inteligencia artificial para lograr avances en ciencias de la vida.

articles.title: DOGE Used AI for Housing Policy. The Government Won’t Say How
articles.raw_content: In response to a public records request, HUD has withheld documents about DOGE’s use of AI—in part by citing a privilege that doesn’t exist.
articles.summary: La HUD retiene documentos sobre el uso de IA por DOGE, invocando un privilegio inexistente.

articles.title: New York becomes the first state to enact a data center moratorium
articles.raw_content:
New hyperscale data centers can't set up shop in New York for up to a year now that Governor Kathy Hochul (D) has signed the nation's first statewide moratorium. But a bill passed by the state legislature that could restrict even more developments still awaits her signature.

The order blocks new environmental permits for data centers over 50 megawatts, which the governor's office says will give the state time to come up with the regulations needed to protect residents from rising energy prices and environmental impact. That's higher than the 20 megawatt threshold approved by state lawmakers. Hochul's office could not immediately identify th …

Read the full story at The Verge.
articles.summary: Nueva York impone una moratoria estatal de un año a nuevos centros de datos hiperscale.

articles.title: Korean telcos pivot to AI infra as government pursues AI G3 ambitions
articles.raw_content: Over the past several weeks, SK Telecom, KT, and LG Uplus have each unveiled major initiatives centered on AI infrastructure, underscoring how telecom operators increasingly see AI platforms and digital…
articles.summary: Operadores como SK Telecom, KT y LG Uplus lanzan iniciativas de infraestructura de inteligencia artificial, subrayando el creciente interés de los operadores en plataformas de AI y servicios digitales.

articles.title: Waze is getting a bunch of new AI-powered features
articles.raw_content:
Waze is getting an AI makeover. Google is integrating its flagship AI assistant, Gemini, into the driving app with the goal of letting users personalize their trips a little more.

Of the four new updates, only two are being described as involving Gemini. Waze says its updating its conversation reporting feature, first introduced in 2024, to allow drivers to use conversational voice commands to report traffic incidents and suggest map updates, like a road closure or outdated house number. In addition, Waze introduced Destination Search, enabling drivers to use (again) use conversation voice commands (e.g., "Find me a coffee shop that's open …

Read the full story at The Verge.
articles.summary: Waze incorpora la inteligencia artificial de Gemini para personalizar trayectos con comandos de voz conversacionales.

articles.title: The real mystery behind Moana: After 1,700 years, why did Polynesians suddenly sail east?
articles.raw_content:
The same question drives both the plot of Moana and decades of archaeological research: Why, after centuries of relative stability, did Polynesian voyagers suddenly begin settling islands thousands of kilometers away across the Pacific?

The latest Moana movie is a live-action adaptation of a Disney animated movie of the same name. While the films are fictional, they draw inspiration from the rich seafaring heritage of Polynesian peoples, whose ancestors undertook one of the greatest episodes of maritime exploration in human history.

New climate evidence may help us understand why they embarked on these voyages.

Read full article

Comments
articles.summary: Nuevas pruebas climáticas podrían explicar por qué los polinesios emprendieron sus legendarias travesías marítimas.
